elements.title: lang::report_page_024_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_u.id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.lastaccess,
       kbi_u.timecreated                          as registered,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE
                   WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                   ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) as grade,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ctx.instanceid)         as courses,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cc.id)                  as completed_courses,
       MAX(ca.completed_activities)           AS completed_activities,
       MAX(lit.timespend)                     AS timespend,
       MAX(lit.visits)                        AS visits,
       ''                                     as cohortname
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(id) AS completed_activities, userid
                  FROM mdl_course_modules_completion
                  WHERE id > 0
                    AND completionstate IN (1, 2)
                  GROUP BY userid) ca ON ca.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_ctx.instanceid AND
                                              kbi_cc.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_cc.timecompleted > 0
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_ctx.instanceid AND
                                       kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id AND
                                       kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_t.userid, SUM(kbi_t.timespend) as timespend, SUM(kbi_t.visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_t
                         JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_t.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_c.visible = 1
                  WHERE kbi_t.courseid > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_t.userid) as lit ON lit.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_u.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
GROUP BY kbi_u.id
